text: Vignesh is a B.E. Electronics and Communication Engineering student (2023–2027) with a CGPA of 8.26 at Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan Engineering College, Perambalur. He has strong fundamentals in Data Structures, Algorithms, and full-stack development.
Vignesh is proficient in C++, C, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, and Java with strong knowledge of Object-Oriented Programming and debugging.
Project: Tic-Tac-Toe. Vignesh built a responsive and user-friendly interface for the classic Tic-Tac-Toe game, strengthening problem-solving and DOM manipulation skills.
Project: Shop Zone. Vignesh developed a e-commerce project with product listings, shopping cart functionality, and responsive user interface design.
Project: Stop Watch. Vignesh created a simple stop watch application with start, stop, and reset functionality and a clean, intuitive user interface.
Vignesh has Achieved academic excellence by securing 3rd position and receiving recognition at HERTZ 2024 and also participated in technical event Nexora project Expo and Niral Thiruvizha.

Vignesh has strong communication skills demonstrated through presentations, and technical discussions and has actively participated in team projects and hackathons, showcasing leadership and collaboration abilities.

Projects: Vignesh has built multiple full-stack software projects including tic-tac-toe, shopzone, to-do list, and stopwatch. These projects demonstrate experience in AI integration, MERN stack development, authentication systems, REST APIs, database design, and scalable web application architecture.
